// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package href provides generators for datastar anchor hypertext references.
// Use these in templates instead of hardcoding URLs.
package href

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// Search references /search/{$}
func Search(query QuerySearch) string {
	var (
		activeStr string
	)

	if query.Active {
		activeStr = strconv.FormatBool(query.Active)
	}

	anyQuery := query.Active

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("/search/")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}

	// n = number of query params already accounted for (for '&')
	n := 0

	if query.Active {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		n++
		l += len("active=") + len(activeStr)
	}
	_ = n

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("/search/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}

	n = 0

	if query.Active {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("active=")
		b.WriteString(activeStr)
	}

	return b.String()
}

// QuerySearch is the query parameters for Search
type QuerySearch struct {
	Active bool `query:"active"`
}
